{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Raindrop body
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Raindrop body]] is designed to provide reaction speed.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
